name: White Mushroom Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped mushrooms and cook until they are golden brown and softened.
3. Stir in the white wine, parsley, salt, and pepper. Cook for 10 minutes on medium heat.
4. Pour in the heavy cream and let it simmer gently until heated through.
5. Serve the sauce over hot pasta, topping with grated cheese.
